deck: 24 cards — Bash, Immolate (upgraded via Blessing of the Forge), Iron Wave, Carnage+, Offering, Feed, Barricade, Corruption, Feel No Pain, Metallicize, Evolve, Disarm, Spot Weakness, Shrug It Off, Second Wind+, Entrench+, 2x Impervious, Body Slam+, Apotheosis, 3 Defend, 1 Strike
relics: Fusion Hammer (Neow swap), White Beast Statue, Anchor, Blood Vial, Preserved Insect, Ornamental Fan, Cursed Key (Act 1 boss), Empty Cage (Act 2 boss), Frozen Egg, Molten Egg, Toxic Egg, The Boot
victory_info: Time Eater (Act 3 Boss), Floor 51, Final HP 26/87
key_moments: Neow swapped Burning Blood for Fusion Hammer. Blessing of the Forge x2 upgraded key cards early.
Immolate on F3. Barricade+Corruption+FNP engine assembled by F21.
Apotheosis from Sensory Stone event solved upgrade problem.
Body Slam+ from Nemesis elite completed the damage loop.
Time Eater defeated via Entrench+ doubling block to 138, Body Slam+ for 146 damage.
lessons: Barricade+Corruption+FNP+Entrench+Body Slam is a second winning formula.
Fusion Hammer as Neow swap viable with Apotheosis.
Three wins in four runs confirms A0 competence.
